title: teucrium scorodonia subsp. baeticum
intro: Teucrium scorodonia subsp. baeticum, also known as Baetic mountain germander, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Teucrium scorodonia subsp. baeticum include its ability to aid in digestion, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
